sglang.title: fix benchmark fp8 blockwise group gemm
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
DeepGemm's signature m_grouped_gemm_fp8_fp8_bf16_nt_contiguous has been changed to m_grouped_fp8_gemm_nt_contiguous, so the benchmark bench_fp8_blockwise_group_gemm.py is broken. This PR is to fix it.
Main:
➜  sglang_dev git:(main) ✗ python ./sgl-kernel/benchmark/bench_fp8_blockwise_group

sglang.title: Enables force reasoning based on chat template for Qwen3-Thinking
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Adds a mechanism to enforce reasoning based on patterns detected in the chat template.
The changes introduce a force_reasoning flag to the TemplateManager and ReasoningParser. This flag is set if reasoning patterns are detected in the chat template, such as <think> tags.
This ensures that

sglang.title: [Feature][Multimodal] Implement LRU cache for multimodal embeddings
sglang.author: ZhengWG
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Current implementation for embedding cache only caches for one request.
However, in some cases, same requests may have different context data but the same multimodal data.
Keeping previous embedding cache can significantly speed up the embedding forward process by avoiding redundant compu

only deserialize part of the typed request and inject bootstrap info in one go
removed unused code
remove retry, this should be fixed later

vllm.author: qscqesze
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Previously, the streaming output for function calls in the minimax implementation was returning the full function content at each step. However, according to OpenAI's specification, streaming outputs should only emit incremental deltas rather than the entire accumulated content.
This incorre

vllm.title: Optimize logger init performance by using module-level constants
vllm.author: skyloevil
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Performance Optimization: Move Logger Method Dictionary to Module Level
Problem Analysis
The current implementation in init_logger() creates a new dictionary methods_to_patch on every function call:
def init_logger(name: str) -> _VllmLogger:
    logger = logging.getLogger(name)
    
    methods_to_p

vllm.title: preload heavy modules when mp method is forkserver
vllm.author: lionelvillard
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Speed up workers initialization by preloading heavy modules when the multiprocessing method is set to 'forkserver' (as fork is unsafe).
Import llm.py only when needed

The speedup is about 4s.
/label startup-ux

vllm.title: feat: Add --enable-log-outputs flag for logging model generations
vllm.author: mizadri
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add --enable-log-outputs flag for logging model generations
📋 Summary
This PR adds optional output logging functionality to complement vLLM's existing input logging. By default, vLLM logs incoming requests (prompts, parameters, token IDs) but does not log model outputs. This feature adds comprehensi
